description_long: This is a lifelike model of a brown horse depicted in mid-gallop, with its body stretched out and muscles clearly defined under a glossy coat. The horse's mane is windswept and loose, flowing backward as if caught in motion, and its tail is similarly animated. The head is elongated and alert, with pricked ears and expressive eyes, while the legs are extended in a dynamic running pose, showing the power and grace of the animal. The hooves are detailed and slightly lifted off the ground, emphasizing the sense of speed and movement. The horse stands on a simple, round, gray base that provides stability and contrast to the rich brown of its body. There is no visible tack or equipment, and the overall appearance is naturalistic and energetic.
description: A dynamic, glossy brown horse in full gallop with a flowing mane and tail, mounted on a round gray base. The model captures the horse's muscular build and sense of motion.
description_view_0: The horse is seen from behind, highlighting the flowing tail, muscular hindquarters, and the alignment of the back legs.
description_view_1: A side view showing the horse's elongated body, extended legs in mid-gallop, and the detailed, windswept mane and tail.
description_view_2: A frontal view focusing on the horse's head, pricked ears, and the symmetry of the front legs as they move forward.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the horse's body stretched out and the mane and tail flowing in the same direction.
attribute_pose: The horse is depicted in a galloping posture with its body fully extended and legs in mid-stride.
attribute_mane_style: The mane is loose and flowing, swept back by the motion.
attribute_leg_position: The front right and rear left legs are extended forward while the front left and rear right legs are extended backward, typical of a galloping stride.
